title: Amphipogon brownii
taxonomy: Amphipogon brownii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Restionaceae. This family is a group of monocotyledonous plants commonly known as restio plants. Restionaceae is part of the larger order Poales, which includes various families of flowering plants. The order Poales is a subgroup of the monocot clade, which also includes families such as Poaceae and Cyperaceae. Amphipogon brownii is native to Western Australia.
